headline: Bernstein Lifts American Tower to Outperform With $207 Price Target. Time to Buy the Tower REITs?
summary: Tower REITs picked up a fresh vote of confidence from Wall Street this morning. headline: Bernstein turns bullish on American Tower, sees 17% upside
summary: Investing.com --Bernstein has upgraded American Tower Corporation from “Market-Perform” to “Outperform,” arguing that investor fears around satellite competition, interest rates, and Dish Network exposure have become overstated.
